---
title: "Unionize Temp Workers"
author: "Katsuhiro Komatsu"
date: "`r format(Sys.time(), '%d %B, %Y')`"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
rm(list = ls())
gc()
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = F, warning = F, message = F)
```


- Unionize temp workers.
- Choose wages and fees in a market to maximize the worker surplus subject to non-negative profits.
- Currently, compute equilibrium for only markets with 5 or less THS establishments
- Specification: Log \& ridge

### Distribution of changes in endogenous variables \& surplus
- Each point corresponds to each establishment other than the figure for surplus.
- Surplus is calculated for each market.

:::: {style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; grid-column-gap: 10px; "}

::: {}

#### Margin
```{r, out.width = "90%"}
knitr::include_graphics(here::here("figuretable/counterfactual/union/small_markets/margin_change_ecdf.png"))
```


:::

::: {}

#### Wage \& Fee
```{r, out.width = "90%"}
knitr::include_graphics(here::here("figuretable/counterfactual/union/small_markets/price_change_ecdf.png"))
```

:::

::::

:::: {style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; grid-column-gap: 10px; "}

::: {}

#### Shares
```{r, out.width = "90%"}
knitr::include_graphics(here::here("figuretable/counterfactual/union/small_markets/share_change_ecdf.png"))
```


:::

::: {}

#### Surplus
```{r, out.width = "90%"}
knitr::include_graphics(here::here("figuretable/counterfactual/union/small_markets/surplus_gain_ecdf.png"))
```

:::

::::
